title: Commit window opened: PR 102 follow-up closeout
body: Lush Rustling Bark opened git:index/head claim ae9c25fd to commit the PR 102 follow-up closeout in three pathspec chunks: branch-touched-files live-thread fix, lint/config remediation, and continuity/handoff state. Staged set was empty before opening. The commit-skill message checks pass; the full commit-skill orchestrator is blocked by the known out-of-scope Practice Core practice.md character hard signal, while blocking hooks do not include that fitness gate.
